channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-21T16:50Z — 1211 outages, 25,321 customers, 642 fair-weather, 24 DC-proximate
item.description: OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | IN-IM: 922 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PECO: 706 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | PECO: 654 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-DUKE: 522 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
